blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 47 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,868 ft. Looking ahead, 55 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 25" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 23" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 39".
